headline: Rosaria shares the spoils as Jack misfires
text: Algeria (Rosaria) and Austria (Grandad) served up a 3-3 thriller, so both got a point and no one got properly stuffed there. Argentina (Nana) did the business, beating Jordan (Sofia) 3-1, with Sofia the day’s clear loser. Colombia (Chris) and Portugal (Jack) played out a blank, which is a bit of a snooze for Jack. Overall, Max is still top on 19 points, with Grandad and Rosaria breathing down the necks on 17. At the other end, Sofia is still bottom on 8, looking like the sweepstake’s resident club shop window.
